title: Petopedia 8x 6cm Rubber Dog Balls – HIGH BOUNCE Floating Toy Ball – Sports, Solid Core, Sponge, Interactive Toys for Puppies, Small and Medium Dogs (Shapes, 8 Balls)
features: 【BOUNCY FLOATING SPORTS BALLS】Made with Natural rubber to the core, these active rolling rubber dog balls Soft in touch and are bouncy enough for Dog's Play, floats in the water (unlike other balls) and on top of that, are virtually indestructible dog toys. However, NOT suitable for Large Dogs due to choking hazard.

【TEXTURED, VIBRANT COLORS & VARIOUS DESIGNS】These Dog Toys for boredom are designed with bright and attractive colors to keep your dog alert & entertained and to locate the ball from a distance. These Sports rubber balls for dogs are designed in the shape of Basketball, Football, Tennis Ball & Baseball. Great Dog Boredom Toys.

【DURABLE & EASY TO CLEAN】These Soft in touch Dog toys are long lasting, and the nature of the material makes it durable. These pet toys are very easy to clean and maintain. Wipe & Rinse with water to remove the dust, dirt or even mud. A Well designed Rubber dog toys Ball.
【ODORLESS, SAFE & NON TOXIC】Made with Natural rubber, these toy balls for dogs are free from and smell or odor, are non-toxic and completely safe pet toys for dogs.
【SUITABLE FOR DOGS】These 6cm Interactive Dog toys can be used for all dogs except for Large Dogs and Strong & Aggressive chewers.
description: 8 X SPORTS DOG RUBBER BALLS (NOT Indestructible Dog Balls) These Solid Core Rubber balls bounce well enough for a dog play, can be through to a fair distance for your dog's interaction to bring it back. Bright colors and unique Sports Design makes these dog toys ball to easily spot on the field, ground or even in the pool. Absolutely safe for all dogs (except Large Dogs and Strong & Aggressive Chewers) and are NOT indestructible dog ball. These are made with natural rubber and does not have any odor to distract your pet. There are 6cm (2.5 Inches approx) in diameter and can be used from puppy ball to Small-medium dogs. These are great dog toys for boredom or puppy toys for boredom, which allows to have a interactive play to add-on to your relationship with your dog. These are NOT dog balls indestructible (NOT Strong dog toys for Large dogs) due to choking hazard for Large dog toys. Additional advantage is that, though this is a dog ball designed for dogs, however, this can also be used for other pets like cats (in a different way though). This turns to be a great toy for fun between any kid and the pet. Features: 8 Pack Sports Dogs Activity Toys. 6cm dia Bright, High Bounce, Floating and Soft in touch Durable material (Not for aggressive chewers) Bright Colours that attracts your dogs attention Catch and Fetch Play for dogs and owners. Dog Stimulation Toys. Great Dog toys for Small Dogs. Great Dog Toys for Medium Dogs. Flexible Material, Bite-Resistant Long Lasting Chew Toys for dogs, Great for Dog Gifts. The Package includes: 8 Dogs Balls (Cheap Dog Toys for this price) Warning This is a Dog Toy Only and not meant for chewing (Swallowing) Playtime should always be supervised. Not for Strong & Aggressive Chewers
